---
title: "Projections"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/css/jquery.dataTables.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/responsive/2.5.0/css/responsive.dataTables.min.css">

        <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/responsive/2.5.0/js/dataTables.responsive.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>
---

<style>
.projection-button-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.proj-btn {
  background: #13294b;
  color: white;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.proj-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.proj-btn.active {
  background: #4b9cd3;
  color: #000;
}

#projection-filters {
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

#projection-table-wrapper {
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

/* force table to show clearly */
#projection-table {
  width: 100% !important;
  border-collapse: collapse !important;
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #fff !important;
}

#projection-table thead th {
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #e9ecef !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 700;
}

#projection-table tbody td {
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #fff !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

table.dataTable thead th,
table.dataTable tbody td {
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.dataTables_wrapper {
  color: #111 !important;
}

.dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_filter input,
.dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_length select {
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #fff !important;
}

.filter-toolbar {
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.filter-toolbar-top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.filter-toggle-btn {
  background: #13294b;
  color: white;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.filter-toggle-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.filter-help-text {
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #333;
}

.filter-panel {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee3;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 16px;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.filter-panel.hidden {
  display: none;
}

.filter-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}

.filter-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}

.filter-group label {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #222;
}

.filter-group select,
.filter-group input {
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #111;
}

.filter-group select[multiple] {
  min-height: 120px;
}

.filter-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 16px;
}

.filter-action-btn {
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.apply-btn {
  background: #4b9cd3;
  color: #000;
}

.reset-btn {
  background: #dfe3e8;
  color: #111;
}
</style>

## Transfer Portal Projections

Use the buttons below to switch between projection views.

<div class="projection-button-row">
  <button class="proj-btn active" data-view="transfer">Transfer Likelihood</button>
  <button class="proj-btn" data-view="return">Return / Leave</button>
  <button class="proj-btn" data-view="destination">Destination Tier</button>
  <button class="proj-btn" data-view="bpm">Projected BPM</button>
</div>

<div id="projection-filters" class="filter-toolbar">
  <div class="filter-toolbar-top">
    <button id="toggle-filters-btn" class="filter-toggle-btn">Filters</button>
    <div class="filter-help-text">Sort by clicking any column header.</div>
  </div>

  <div id="filter-panel" class="filter-panel hidden">
    <div class="filter-grid">
      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="team-filter">Team</label>
        <select id="team-filter" multiple></select>
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="conf-filter">Conference</label>
        <select id="conf-filter" multiple></select>
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="role-filter">Role</label>
        <select id="role-filter" multiple></select>
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="gp-min-filter">Min GP</label>
        <input type="number" id="gp-min-filter" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 10">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="pts-min-filter">Min PTS</label>
        <input type="number" id="pts-min-filter" min="0" step="0.1" placeholder="e.g. 8">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="mp-min-filter">Min MP</label>
        <input type="number" id="mp-min-filter" min="0" step="0.1" placeholder="e.g. 15">
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="filter-actions">
      <button id="apply-filters-btn" class="filter-action-btn apply-btn">Apply Filters</button>
      <button id="reset-filters-btn" class="filter-action-btn reset-btn">Reset Filters</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="projection-table-wrapper">
  <table id="projection-table" class="display nowrap" style="width:100%">
    <thead></thead>
    <tbody></tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<script>
let projectionData = [];
let currentTable = null;

const viewColumns = {
  transfer: [
    "player",
    "team",
    "conf",
    "height",
    "GP",
    "PTS",
    "REB",
    "AST",
    "PRA",
    "pred_transfer",
    "transfer_prob_mean",
    "transfer_prob_lo",
    "transfer_prob_hi"
  ],
  return: [
    "player",
    "team",
    "conf",
    "height",
    "GP",
    "PTS",
    "REB",
    "AST",
    "PRA",
    "pred_return",
    "pred_leave"
  ],
  destination: [
    "player",
    "team",
    "conf",
    "height",
    "GP",
    "PTS",
    "REB",
    "AST",
    "PRA",
    "pred_destination_tier",
    "dest_prob_high",
    "dest_prob_upper_mid",
    "dest_prob_low"
  ],
  bpm: [
    "player",
    "team",
    "conf",
    "height",
    "GP",
    "PTS",
    "REB",
    "AST",
    "PRA",
    "pred_BPM_low",
    "pred_BPM_low_lo",
    "pred_BPM_low_hi",
    "pred_BPM_upper_mid",
    "pred_BPM_upper_mid_lo",
    "pred_BPM_upper_mid_hi",
    "pred_BPM_high",
    "pred_BPM_high_lo",
    "pred_BPM_high_hi"
  ]
};

function prettifyLabel(col) {
  return col
    .replaceAll("_", " ")
    .replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
}

function toNumber(val) {
  const num = parseFloat(val);
  return isNaN(num) ? 0 : num;
}

function enrichData(data) {
  return data.map(row => {
    const pts = toNumber(row.PTS);
    const reb = toNumber(row.REB);
    const ast = toNumber(row.AST);

    return {
      ...row,
      PRA: +(pts + reb + ast).toFixed(1)
    };
  });
}

function buildTable(viewName) {
  if (!projectionData || projectionData.length === 0) return;

  const cols = viewColumns[viewName];

  const validCols = cols.filter(col =>
    Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(projectionData[0], col)
  );

  console.log("Building view:", viewName);
  console.log("Columns used:", validCols);

  const columns = validCols.map(col => ({
    title: prettifyLabel(col),
    data: col,
    defaultContent: ""
  }));

  if (currentTable) {
    currentTable.destroy();
    $('#projection-table').empty();
  }

  currentTable = $('#projection-table').DataTable({
    data: projectionData,
    columns: columns,
    pageLength: 25,
    responsive: true,
    scrollX: true,
    order: [],
    autoWidth: false,
    deferRender: true
  });
}

// Load CSV properly
Papa.parse("data/complete_2026_scored.csv", {
  download: true,
  header: true,
  skipEmptyLines: true,
  complete: function(results) {
    console.log("CSV loaded:", results.data.length, "rows");

    projectionData = enrichData(results.data);

    if (!projectionData || projectionData.length === 0) {
      document.getElementById("projection-filters").innerText =
        "No data loaded.";
      return;
    }

    buildTable("transfer");
  },
  error: function(error) {
    document.getElementById("projection-filters").innerText =
      "Error loading data.";
    console.error(error);
  }
});

// Button switching
document.querySelectorAll(".proj-btn").forEach(button => {
  button.addEventListener("click", function() {
    document.querySelectorAll(".proj-btn").forEach(btn =>
      btn.classList.remove("active")
    );

    this.classList.add("active");

    buildTable(this.dataset.view);
  });
});

const toggleFiltersBtn = document.getElementById("toggle-filters-btn");
const filterPanel = document.getElementById("filter-panel");

toggleFiltersBtn.addEventListener("click", function() {
  filterPanel.classList.toggle("hidden");
});
</script>
